title: Spicy Smoky Greek Lamb Kebabs
description: A quick, spicy and smoky lamb kebab packed with Mediterranean flavors, finished with a crunchy peanut cookie crumble for a unique twist.

ingredients.name: Bamboo or metal skewers
ingredients.notes: soak bamboo skewers 20 minutes in water

instructions: In a bowl whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, cumin, cayenne, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, salt, and almond milk to make the marinate.
Add lamb cubes to the bowl, stir until coated, cover, and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes (up to 2 hours).
Thread lamb cubes onto soaked skewers, leaving a little space between pieces.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high and lightly oil the grates.
Grill kebabs 3-4 minutes per side, or until desired doneness, brushing with leftover marinate every 2 minutes.
Transfer cooked kebabs to a serving platter. Sprinkle crushed peanut cookies over the top for a crunchy finish.
Serve immediately with a side of Greek salad or flatbread.
